subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-06 en route to Edinburgh
subcodes.first_line: Nur 'Ali-Shah was rejected by both the government and the people. He became homeless and an exile.
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور علي شاه مطرود دولت و ملت شد و آواره غربت گشت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
